task_completion.visual_evidence: OrientDB Studio interface or OrientDB console showing a successful connection to the 'demodb' database.

task_completion.description: Configure Hotels.Name to be MANDATORY and NOTNULL
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL execution success messages for 'ALTER PROPERTY Hotels.Name MANDATORY true' and 'ALTER PROPERTY Hotels.Name NOTNULL true', or the OrientDB Studio schema manager showing these properties checked/enabled for Hotels.Name.

task_completion.description: Configure Hotels.Stars to have MIN 1 and MAX 5
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL execution success messages for 'ALTER PROPERTY Hotels.Stars MIN 1' and 'ALTER PROPERTY Hotels.Stars MAX 5', or the OrientDB Studio schema manager showing these values set for Hotels.Stars.

task_completion.description: Configure Profiles.Email to be MANDATORY and NOTNULL
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL execution success messages for 'ALTER PROPERTY Profiles.Email MANDATORY true' and 'ALTER PROPERTY Profiles.Email NOTNULL true', or the OrientDB Studio schema manager showing these properties checked/enabled for Profiles.Email.
SQL execution success messages for 'ALTER PROPERTY Orders.Price MIN 0', or the OrientDB Studio schema manager showing this value set for Orders.Price.

task_completion.description: Configure Restaurants.Name to be MANDATORY and NOTNULL
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL execution success messages for 'ALTER PROPERTY Restaurants.Name MANDATORY true' and 'ALTER PROPERTY Restaurants.Name NOTNULL true', or the OrientDB Studio schema manager showing these properties checked/enabled for Restaurants.Name.

task_completion.description: Enable STRICTMODE for the Reviews class
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL execution success message for 'ALTER CLASS Reviews STRICTMODE true', or the OrientDB Studio schema manager showing Strict Mode enabled for the Reviews class.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OrientDB software (Studio GUI or console)
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OrientDB Studio web interface or a terminal running the OrientDB console, not just a text editor with SQL commands.

integrity.description: Agent actually executed the schema changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for execution success messages, query results, or updated schema views indicating the changes were applied to the database, rather than just typed out.

integrity.description: Agent did not mock the verification script or database state
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of the agent editing Python verification scripts or manually creating fake success outputs in a text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task targets OrientDB 3.2.36 and the built-in 'demodb' database. Valid ways to apply these constraints include using the OrientDB Studio Schema Manager GUI or executing SQL commands (e.g., 'ALTER PROPERTY Hotels.Name MANDATORY true', 'ALTER CLASS Reviews STRICTMODE true'). Expected final states: Hotels.Name (mandatory=true, notNull=true), Hotels.Stars (min=1, max=5), Profiles.Email (mandatory=true, notNull=true), Orders.Price (min=0), Restaurants.Name (mandatory=true, notNull=true), Reviews (strictMode=true).
